mapper.select:
SELECT id, client_uuid, client_id, tenant_id, enabled, remark, is_deleted, create_time, update_time FROM oauth2_registered_client_biz
AND client_id LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.clientId}, '%')
AND tenant_id LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.tenantId}, '%')
AND enabled LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.enabled}, '%')
AND is_deleted LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.isDeleted}, '%')
SELECT client_uuid, client_id, tenant_id, enabled, remark, is_deleted, create_time, update_time FROM oauth2_registered_client_biz WHERE client_id = #{clientId}
mapper.update: UPDATE oauth2_registered_client_biz SET enabled = 0, is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE client_id = #{clientId}
UPDATE oauth2_registered_client_biz SET enabled = 1, is_deleted = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE client_id = #{clientId}
